items.title: Field Coaching
items.description: Structured ride-along coaching with competency-based scoring.

items.title: How to add Competencies for Field Coaching
items.description: A user who is having admin access can add the competencies for field coaching.

items.title: How to create Field Coaching Template
items.description: Only users with ADMIN roles can create field coaching templates.

items.title: How to Create Field mapping
items.description: To create a field mapping, go to Admin > KPI Settings > Field Mappings.

items.title: How to review Field Coaching from Managers View in Mobile
items.description: How to open Field Coaching in Manager view:
